steps.t: Herubrand is in the cellar of the farm-house. You should bring the letter to Herubrand.
Gifemund is in the ore refinery building within Woodhurst, near the centre of the city. Herubrand told you to insinuate yourself into the good graces …
The overseer is at Wid Isernore, just outside of Woodhurst. Gifemund told you to speak with the overseer of his mine and learn how you might help ther…
Wid Isernore is filled with ore-bearing stone. The overseer asked that you gather ore for him.
The mine overseer is at Wid Isernore. The ore you gathered should be returned to the mine overseer.
